interactions.label: Rest on Bed
interactions.description: A soft bed. A short rest might restore some energy before the next challenge.

interactions.label: Study at Desk
interactions.description: Your desk is covered with notes and textbooks. A few hours of study could sharpen your academics.

interactions.label: Play Games
interactions.description: A small console and monitor. A little play can restore your mood, but too much drains energy.

interactions.label: Sit on Rug
interactions.description: A green rug in the middle of the room. A quiet place to sit and gather your thoughts.
